input.content: Analyze engagement data from recent campaigns. Recommend the best day and time to schedule future outreach emails, explaining how engagement metrics support your choice.

content.text:
Based on the analysis of recent campaign data, I've identified key engagement metrics and optimal times for email outreach:

- **Morning Outreach:** Emails sent such as "Sales Newsletter" performed well when sent in the mid-morning to early afternoon, specifically around 10:30 AM. This time saw an open rate of 55.9% and a click rate of 11.3%. It suggests higher engagement when targeting this time window.

- **Evening Outreach:** "Your Sales Summary," sent in the evening around 6:10 PM, achieved a strong open rate of 52.8% and a click rate of 24.5%, indicating that evening times can also be effective.

Recommendation: Schedule future outreach emails during mid-morning (10:00 AM - 12:00 PM) and early evening (6:00 PM - 8:00 PM) to maximize engagement based on these insights. Different segments may respond better at different times, so testing these periods can further optimize engagement.

summary.text: Navigating to Email section for metrics
Sorting emails by descending open rate

trajectory.task_prompt: Analyze engagement data from recent campaigns. Recommend the best day and time to schedule future outreach emails, explaining how engagement metrics support your choice.
trajectory.final_message:

- **Morning Outreach:** Emails sent such as "Sales Newsletter" performed well when sent in the mid-morning to early afternoon, specifically around 10:30 AM. This time saw an open rate of 55.9% and a click rate of 11.3%. It suggests higher engagement when targeting this time window.

- **Evening Outreach:** "Your Sales Summary," sent in the evening around 6:10 PM, achieved a strong open rate of 52.8% and a click rate of 24.5%, indicating that evening times can also be effective.

Recommendation: Schedule future outreach emails during mid-morning (10:00 AM - 12:00 PM) and early evening (6:00 PM - 8:00 PM) to maximize engagement based on these insights. Different segments may respond better at different times, so testing these periods can further optimize engagement.

input.content: Show me all contacts that have not had any engagement (no emails opened, clicks, or logged activities) in the last 30 days. Provide a short summary of how many contacts match this and suggest what to do next.

content.text:
I searched for contacts without any engagement in the last 30 days (no email opens, clicks, or logged activities) in the HubSpot dashboard. According to the filter applied, all contacts have shown some form of activity within the last 30 days, meaning there are no contacts requiring re-engagement at this time.

Moving forward, maintaining routine monitoring of engagement metrics will ensure that any future disengaged contacts can be identified and approached promptly for re-engagement. Should I review engagement data for a different time period or refine the criteria further?
